args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Task checklist for rebuilding the features-section-14 component into an Integrations section. Track tasks for header, logo grid, CTA button, and build/compiling check."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Integrations Section Implementation Checklist

- [/] Rebuild `features-section-14.tsx` into Integrations section
  - [ ] Configure header with tag `:: INTEGRATIONS ::`, H2: `Plays nicely with your stack`, and subtext description
  - [ ] Implement the 12-cell logo grid (Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Razorpay, Zapier, Google Sheets, Pabbly, Make, Klaviyo, Calendly)
  - [ ] Add centered CTA button: `View all integrations →`
- [ ] Run Next.js build to verify compilation
- [ ] Verify UI layout visually in local dev server
"
args.Description: "Update task.md to track integrations section tasks."
